name: aircode
description: General-purpose agent platform built on Pi Agent Harness

scripts.build: npm run build -w @aircode/shared && npm run build -w @aircode/runtime && npm run build -w @aircode/smoke-cli && npm run build -w @aircode/server && npm run build -w @aircode/web
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @aircode/shared && npm run build -w @aircode/runtime && concurrently -k -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @aircode/server" "npm run dev -w @aircode/web"
scripts.dev:server: npm run build -w @aircode/shared && npm run build -w @aircode/runtime && npm run dev -w @aircode/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @aircode/shared && npm run typecheck -w @aircode/runtime && npm run typecheck -w @aircode/smoke-cli && npm run typecheck -w @aircode/server && npm run typecheck -w @aircode/web
